root:errors=0
root:warnings=0
root:options_present=false
root:instance_present=true
root:module_present=false
root:css_present=false
root:fragment_len=4
root/options:none
root/instance:context=default
root/instance:attrs=["lang"]
root/module:none
root/css:none
root/fragment:len=4
root/fragment/0:type=Text
root/fragment/0:span=28..30
root/fragment/0:raw="\n\n"
root/fragment/1:type=SnippetBlock
root/fragment/1:span=30..92
root/fragment/1:name="generic"
root/fragment/1/body:len=3
root/fragment/1/body/0:type=Text
root/fragment/1/body/0:span=74..76
root/fragment/1/body/0:raw="\n\t"
root/fragment/1/body/1:type=ExpressionTag
root/fragment/1/body/1:span=76..81
root/fragment/1/body/1:expr="val"
root/fragment/1/body/2:type=Text
root/fragment/1/body/2:span=81..82
root/fragment/1/body/2:raw="\n"
root/fragment/2:type=Text
root/fragment/2:span=92..94
root/fragment/2:raw="\n\n"
root/fragment/3:type=SnippetBlock
root/fragment/3:span=94..192
root/fragment/3:name="complex_generic"
root/fragment/3/body:len=3
root/fragment/3/body/0:type=Text
root/fragment/3/body/0:span=174..176
root/fragment/3/body/0:raw="\n\t"
root/fragment/3/body/1:type=ExpressionTag
root/fragment/3/body/1:span=176..181
root/fragment/3/body/1:expr="val"
root/fragment/3/body/2:type=Text
